description: The NetApp HCI H610S Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) is shipped with a documented default account and password that should be changed during the initial node setup. During upgrades to Element 11.8 and 12.0 the H610S BMC account password is reset to the default documented value which allows remote attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS).
